# SolarTruth
> Independent solar analysis and engineering-grade ROI modeling.

## Overview
SolarTruth is a specialized financial modeling tool for homeowners. Unlike installer-affiliated calculators, it provides independent, physics-based analysis using government-validated models and live utility data.

## Key Capabilities
- **NEM 3.0 Modeling:** Precise calculations for the latest utility billing structures.
- **Roof Timing Analysis:** Factors in the $8k–$12k cost of panel removal/reinstallation for aging roofs.
- **EV + Solar Integration:** Calculates how electric vehicle charging affects solar sizing.
- **Quote Verification:** A tool for homeowners to verify the "real numbers" behind installer sales pitches.

## Data Sources
- EIA Form 861 (2023)
- DSIRE (2024)
- IRA 2022 / State PUC orders

## Links
- [Calculator](https://solartruth.vercel.app/)
- [API Documentation](https://solartruth.vercel.app/api-docs)
- [Contact](https://solartruth.vercel.app/contact)
